positive: A hyper-detailed graphic illustration featuring intertwining floral and celestial motifs. Elements include stylized moons, nebulae patterns, and abstracted botanicals like ferns, lilies, and starburst clusters. The style is a blend of Art Deco geometry and delicate Neo-Art Nouveau linework. High contrast black and white with touches of deep indigo and metallic gold accents. Central, symmetrical composition, highly detailed, isolated on a pure white background, suitable for seamless commercial apparel printing. Clean lines, strong silhouettes, elegant visual balance, vector quality.
negative: blur, grainy, text, watermark, signature, multiple limbs, extra fingers, poor anatomy, noise, low quality, bad composition, jpeg artifacts, clutter, childish, photorealistic
